candidates.why: Primary operating revenue line; matches Total Revenue amounts, suggesting it is the core sales figure.
Revenue-like but appears to be a secondary component rather than the main top-line.
Component of revenue specific to gas; not the main aggregate revenue line.
Describes revenue but likely a component; aggregate line is preferable if available.
Explicit aggregate of all revenue sources; matches Sales values and is labeled as total.
Represents cost, not revenue; should not be used for REVT.
Financial income, not operating revenue.
Finance/interest income, not operating revenue.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Earnings metric, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income, not revenue.

variables.notes: Using Total Revenue as the primary top-line measure, with Sales as a backup since both carry the same amounts and may alternate over time.

candidates.why: Component of cost of goods sold but not the full COGS aggregate.
Explicit total cost of revenues / COGS line; best single measure of direct production costs.
Exploration expense is more like operating/exploration cost, not core COGS; better excluded from main COGS input.
Broader operating expenses, likely including overhead; not purely COGS.
Likely part of SG&A or mixed; not a clean COGS total.
Clearly SG&A, not COGS.
Mixed other income/expense; not COGS.
Mixed other operating items, not direct COGS.
Net operating result, not a pure cost line.
Financial, not operating cost of sales.
Financial, not operating cost of sales.
Balance sheet accrual, not the P&L COGS figure.
Liability balance, not COGS.
Liability balance, not COGS.

variables.notes: Cost of revenues/COGS is the clearly labeled aggregate of direct production/service costs and is used alone to avoid double-counting component lines.

candidates.why: Broad operating expense bucket below gross profit; a suitable proxy for SG&A-type overhead.
Classic SG&A component (administrative/general).
Mixed income/expense; less clearly pure SG&A.
D&A within SG&A; instructions say to exclude D&A from XSGA, so this should not be selected.

variables.notes: Selected the main overhead buckets (Operating expenses and Administrative/General Expenses) as SG&A components and excluded D&A-in-SGA and mixed other operating income/expense per instructions.

candidates.why: Could relate to growth initiatives but is not clearly research & development expense; likely corporate development instead.
Capitalized development on the balance sheet, not an R&D expense line in the income statement.

variables.notes: No explicit research & development expense line appears in the income statement; Business Development and Development Assets are not clearly R&D expense, so XRD is set to 0.

candidates.why: Interest expense line (sign convention positive); relevant if main Interest Expense line is missing for some years.
Line that may bundle interest with amortization and related costs; acceptable fallback if pure interest expense is missing.
Net interest result; can serve as a fallback if no explicit interest expense is available.
Primary, clearly labeled interest expense line in the income statement.
Balance sheet liability, not a P&L expense; should not be used for XINT.
Balance sheet liability, not a P&L expense; should not be used for XINT.

variables.notes: Ordered to prefer the pure Interest Expense line, then alternative interest-expense formulations if the primary line is missing in some years.

candidates.why: Income statement financing cost line; not an equity balance.
Component of equity but not total book equity; should not be used alone for BE.
Explicit total equity line, representing shareholders’ equity; appropriate for BE when no separate minority interest is reported.
Duplicate labeling of Total equity; same figures; either could be used but only one is needed.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Technical balancing line, not the equity amount itself.
Represents total assets/liabilities plus equity; not equity alone.

variables.notes: Used Total equity as total book equity attributable to owners; no separate non-controlling interest line exists, so BE is the full equity balance.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Income measure before minority interest, not the balance sheet amount of non-controlling interests.

variables.notes: No balance sheet line for minority/non-controlling interests is present; MIB is therefore set to 0 (empty selection).
